case_title: DIPAK PATEL VS. MARY OLDMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLDMAN, MARY SAUNDERSON, CEDRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 6TH STREET #216, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACE IN PICK UP BOX)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT OLDMAN, MARY SAUNDERSON, CEDRICK
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SAUNDERSON, CEDRICK
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.70 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OLDMAN, MARY SAUNDERSON, CEDRICK
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK AS TO DEFENDANT OLDMAN, MARY SAUNDERSON, CEDRICK DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK SERVED JUL-28-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAUNDERSON, CEDRICK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK SERVED JUL-28-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OLDMAN, MARY
